title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 3 - Analyzing (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to artificial intelligence and computer science taught by David J. Malan and Brian Yu. The course is available through multiple channels including edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, with community engagement on Discord, GitHub, Reddit, and other platforms.
writeup: This is Chapter 3 of CS50's introduction to artificial intelligence and computer science, taught by Brian Yu, recorded live and unedited and focused on analyzing. The session is part of Harvard University's CS50, a course developed by David J. Malan and Brian Yu. CS50 is distributed across multiple channels, including edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, with community engagement on Discord, GitHub, and Reddit.
